# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Resources:
  MyQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: MyServerlessEventProcessingQueue
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 86400 # Retain messages for 24 hours (in seconds)
      VisibilityTimeout: 300       # Messages are hidden for 5 minutes (in seconds)

  MyTopic:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Topic
    Properties:
      TopicName: MyServerlessEventProcessingTopic

  QueuePolicy:
    Type: AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy
    Properties:
      Queues:
        - !Ref MyQueue
      PolicyDocument:
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement:
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
              - sqs:DeleteMessage
              - sqs:GetQueueAttributes
            Resource: !GetAtt MyQueue.Arn

  TopicSubscription:
    Type: AWS::SNS::Subscription
    Properties:
      Endpoint: !GetAtt MyQueue.Arn
      Protocol: sqs
      TopicArn: !Ref MyTopic
Outputs:
  QueueName:
    Value: !Ref MyQueue
  TopicName:
    Value: !Ref MyTopic
